page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n2.medium is a general-purpose virtual machine instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. The instance is configured with 2 dedicated vCPUs across 2 physical cores, with 1 thread per core. It is equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, and it provides zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Benchmark evaluations place the ecs.n2.medium in the lower performance tiers. Single-core CPU performance via stress-ng is measured at 1107.09, which is categorized as weak, while multi-core performance drops to a poor rating at 2193.58. Memory bandwidth tests show a read-only small block speed of 157.12 GB/sec, but this drops significantly to 16.61 GB/sec for large blocks. Cryptographic and compression tasks also reflect lower-tier performance, with a single-threaded gzip compression rate of 18.98 GB/sec and a Passmark CPU encryption score of 819.87.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation but modest benchmark results, the ecs.n2.medium represents an entry-level hardware profile. It is best suited for lightweight, non-resource-intensive workloads such as basic web serving, development environments, or simple background tasks. The lack of local storage requires external block storage attachment, which should be factored into the overall resource footprint.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n2.medium is an entry-level, general-purpose virtual machine instance utilizing the KVM hypervisor. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY x86_64 processor operating at 2.5 GHz, configured with 2 dedicated vCPUs, 2 physical cores, and 8.0 GB of RAM. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Performance benchmarks indicate lower-tier capabilities, with a stress-ng single-core score of 1107.09 and a multi-core score of 2193.58. Memory bandwidth ranges from 157.12 GB/sec for cached small blocks down to 16.61 GB/sec for uncached large blocks. With a Passmark CPU score of 2641.62 and database operations benchmarked at 553.1, this instance is designed for lightweight workloads. It is best suited for basic web serving, development environments, and low-intensity background processing where dedicated CPU allocation is required without high computational demands.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n2.medium is a general-purpose instance featuring 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, designed for lightweight workloads and basic web serving.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n2.medium is a general-purpose KVM instance with 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 8.0 GB RAM, and no local storage.
tagline: A dedicated dual-core x86_64 virtual instance with balanced memory allocation for entry-level workloads and basic web hosting.
bullet_points: Powered by a 2.5 GHz Intel Xeon 8269CY processor with 2 dedicated vCPUs
Equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core)
No bundled local storage or integrated GPU accelerators
Features AVX and AVX512F instruction set support
Best suited for lightweight web serving, development, and low-intensity tasks
